name: Ninon
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A second-floor two-bedroom residence of almost 150 square metres gross in the village heart.
description: A second-floor two-bedroom residence of almost 150 square metres gross in the village heart of Green Coast, Palasë. A broad living room anchors the plan, with two proper bedrooms and the resort's promenades, pools and Blue Flag beach below.
highlights: Just east of the central plaza, where the lanes meet
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Ninon sits just east of the central plaza, where the village's main lanes meet — close to everything the resort keeps at its centre. The hotel is a short walk north, the parking entrance to the west, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
